purpose: The 7.7n strongest generic control; candidate must beat or match it with CRA-native attribution.
pass_requirement: Candidate must beat this control by at least 5% on Lorenz or show equal performance with stronger CRA-specific ablation separation.
Candidate must beat or match while preserving internal-mechanism ablation losses.

purpose: Show internalization improves current CRA rather than merely matching it.
pass_requirement: Candidate improves Lorenz and does not materially regress Mackey/NARMA.
If nonlinear branches are claimed, disabling them should hurt.
If temporal traces are claimed, removing them should hurt.
